contexts.context: ...which it should be known for his. The Muse <mark>Clio</mark> furnished the four letters which have been thus used...
9.  In Greek Mythology, <mark>Clio</mark> (or Klio) is the Muse of History....
...the letters which compose the name of the Muse <mark>Clio</mark>; which gave occasion to the elegant compliment paid...
...Virtue her last effort made,You brought your <mark>Clio</mark> to the virgin's aid.17
